evals.prompt: I just finished implementing the feature. Can you verify it's done?
evals.expected_output: Run Red-Team Verification: 1) Adversarial Audit for Standard Defaults, 2) Protocol Check for Pre-Write Audit Log, 3) Execution Bias Check.

evals.prompt: Run a self-scan on the code I just wrote.
evals.expected_output: Post-Write Self-Scan: Read the diff, check against Anti-Patterns in all active skills, fix violations immediately.

evals.prompt: What should I check before marking a task complete?
evals.expected_output: Check for execution bias: local mocks instead of shared fakes, hardcoded styles instead of design tokens, missing Pre-Write Audit Log. Functional success does not equal protocol success.

should_not_trigger: Write a Go function to parse JSON
Add unit tests for the auth service
